name: Blaze Pickleball
description: Membership available!

name: Bloomfield Early Learning Center BELC
description: Come play pickleball at Bloomfield Early Learning Center BELC in Bloomfield, CT! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved. Players have access to lights.

name: Bloomfield Leisure Centre
description: Bloomfield Leisure Centre is a place to play pickleball in Bloomfield, CT. There are 5 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.
hours: Monday-Friday 9:00am-5:00pm e-mail : recreation@bloomfieldct.gov Contact Us Bloomfield Parks, Recreation & Leisure Services 330 Park Avenue Bloomfield, CT 06002 Email: Recreation@BloomfieldCT.gov Phone: 860-243-2923 Fax: 860-242-4267 Connect with Us Hours Of Operation Office Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm © 2026 Bloomfield Parks, Recreation & Leisure Services Terms ○ Privacy ○ Help ○ How To Provided by MyRec.com Recreation Software

name: Bloomfield Tennis and Pickleball Club
description: Bloomfield Tennis and Pickleball Club is a place to play pickleball in Bloomfield, CT. There are 12 hard courts. 6 are outdoors and 6 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved.
fees: Fee required — Outdoor pickleball members pay $14/person for a 2-hour game (non-members $20)

name: Buena Vista Courts
description: Buena Vista Courts is a place to play pickleball in West Hartford, CT. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Camp Pickleball
description: Camp Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Plainville, CT. There are 10 indoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and food. Reservations are available.

name: Churchill Park
description: Churchill Park is a place to play pickleball in Newington, CT. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Diamond Kings Pickleball Courts
description:
Our temperature controlled indoor facility located in Healthtrax Bristol. Enjoy playing on warm, very well lit courts with plenty of parking. Pictures of our turfed indoor facility indoor courts will be added soon! 
We look forward to seeing you this winter!
Please email info@dkacademy.com or call 860-584-1386 and we'll get back to ASAP to answer any questions you may have.
open_play_schedule: DK Pickleball Courts will be open October- April
fees: Fee required — Monthly Memberships and Drop In Rates | COMING SOON!

name: Dill Dinkers
description: Dill Dinkers is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Simsbury, CT. There are 7 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, lights, trainers or lessons, and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: East Berlin Tennis Courts
description: East Berlin Tennis Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Berlin, CT. There are 4 outdoor clay courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: East Hartford Pickleball Club
description: East Hartford Pickleball Club is a place to play pickleball in East Hartford, CT. There are 4 indoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, lights, locker rooms, trainers or lessons, youth programming, wheelchair accessibility, and adaptive programming.
fees: Members only — $2 additional fee for non- members

name: Ellsworth School
description: Ellsworth School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in South Windsor, CT. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

description: Elm Ridge Park Courts is a place to play pickleball in Rocky Hill, CT. There are 5 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility is wheelchair accessible.

name: Elmwood Community Center
description:
Elmwood Community Center and Elmwood Senior Center both run pickleball classes. Sign up for classes is through RecDesk at https://westhartford.recdesk.com/Community/Home

Very limited rental opportunities exist. Players would need to bring their own net. Call Elmwood Community Center for more information.

name: NewGen Pickleball
description:
We are open now and lots of our members are enjoying PB in this world class facility, providing indoor, lighted, climate-controlled (AC and Heat), and 'ExtremeCushion' courts. Please go to website www.NewGenPickleball.com and create a free account for regular communications and also reserving the court. 
Currently we are not offering Open Plays and Leagues; please reserve the court to play with your friends and families.
Contact us at contact@newgenpickleball.com
